law: chip label contrast on the actual glass surface
refute_by: a rendered-CSS contrast measurement over the rendered chip measures below the claimed WCAG threshold
rendered_css: .chip-liquid-glass-regular { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border: 0; cursor: default; border-radius: 999px; min-height: 26px; padding: 5px 12px; background: color-mix(in srgb, #7dcfff 16%, transparent); color: #c0caf5; font: 500 13px/1.33 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; transition: all 260ms cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(160%); backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(160%); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.20); }
